chosen_action.title: Exclude already-handed-off manual publisher targets from fresh primary-repo-flat packet selection

why_this_action.summary: The latest selector state could still treat ctxt.dev / Signum as a fresh primary-repo-flat packet target even though a manual outreach asset for that target had already been delivered in the current review window. That made the runtime capable of re-surfacing the primary-repo-flat packet instead of honoring the execution board's no-truthful-packet state.
shared_findings_used: drafts/marketing_execution_board_latest.md: no truthful do-now packet remains in the current review window
agents/marketing/logs/marketing_2026-05-25_manual_outreach_asset_follow_through_delivery.json: ctxt.dev / Signum was already handed off to current chat
agents/marketing/logs/marketing_2026-05-25_primary_repo_flat_contact_manual_delivery_refresh.json: the refreshed packet already has a live review window
agents/marketing/logs/primary_repo_flat_contact_discovery_latest.json: discovered publisher targets still included ctxt.dev / Signum alongside NxCode and TIMEWELL

result.summary: Patched the selector to subtract actively handed-off manual publisher targets from fresh primary-repo-flat packet selection, then re-ran the 2026-05-25 08:49 lane decision so the latest lane artifact returned to distribution_architecture_repair instead of packet churn.
